---
title: "Assignment 1: Marketing Campaign Analysis"
author: "Min"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
  pdf: default
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| include: false

library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

# load dataset
data_raw <- read_csv("data/36730769_Min Aung.csv")

# preliminary cleaning
clean_data <- data_raw |>
  clean_names() |>
  distinct()
